categories.name: Sales Revenue
categories.description: income from sales of products or services

categories.name: Cost of Goods Sold
categories.description: inventory, materials, and direct costs of goods sold

categories.name: Rent & Lease
categories.description: office, retail, or equipment rent and leases

categories.name: Utilities
categories.description: electricity, water, gas, internet, phone for the business

categories.name: Bank & Merchant Fees
categories.description: bank charges and payment processing fees

categories.name: Other
categories.description: anything that does not fit the above
